snapshot_purpose: Compact derived Phase 1 and Phase 2 inputs required by the local and hosted analytical viewer.

source_datasets.provider: Instituto Hidrografico de la Marina, distributed by CNIG

source_providers: Instituto Geografico Nacional / Centro Nacional de Informacion Geografica

licences.ihm_spain_coastline: Free reuse under the IHM/CNIG geographic-information licence implementing Orden FOM/2807/2015, compatible with CC BY 4.0, with mandatory source recognition; terms cover derivatives.
licences.cnig_administrative_boundaries: IGN/CNIG use licence under Orden FOM/2807/2015, compatible with CC BY 4.0; free lawful reuse with mandatory recognition of IGN origin and ownership; terms cover derivatives.
licences.cnig_mdt02_cob2: IGN/CNIG use licence under Orden FOM/2807/2015, compatible with CC BY 4.0; free lawful reuse with mandatory recognition of IGN origin and ownership; terms cover derivatives.
licences.emodnet_dtm_2024_lat: Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International (CC BY 4.0); EMODnet-created data products are EU-owned and licensed under CC BY 4.0 unless stated otherwise.

required_attribution: Obra derivada de LC 2023 CC-BY 4.0 armada.mde.es/ihm/
Obra derivada de BDLJE CC-BY 4.0 ign.es
Obra derivada de MDT02-cob2 2015-2021 CC-BY 4.0 ign.es
This data product was created by EMODnet (https://emodnet.ec.europa.eu/en/), and is owned by the EU and licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International (CC BY 4.0) license.
derived_output_statement: The snapshot contains project-authored AOI geometry and compact vector/tabular analytical derivatives. It does not contain the IHM coastline source archive, CNIG administrative or elevation source datasets, or the EMODnet source grid. Segment-level terrain and regional bathymetry values are screening derivatives and are not navigation, site-level depth, underwater-clearance or safety information.
excluded_source_data: data/raw/coastline/LC.zip and extracted IHM coastline files
data/raw/boundaries/LINEAS_LIMITE.zip and extracted CNIG administrative boundaries
large QA images and local caches

review_basis: IHM/CNIG legal notice states that use of the geographic products and their derivatives is governed by the Orden FOM/2807/2015 licence compatible with CC BY 4.0.
CNIG data policy states free lawful use, including derivatives, with mandatory recognition, under a licence compatible with CC BY 4.0.
EMODnet terms state that EMODnet-created data products are EU-owned and CC BY 4.0 unless otherwise indicated; the selected DTM 2024 product carries no contrary restriction.
Only compact derived tables and project-authored AOI geometry are included; official raw source datasets are excluded.

source_reviews.ihm_spain_coastline: reviewed; derived redistribution permitted with the recorded IHM attribution
source_reviews.cnig_administrative_boundaries: reviewed; derived redistribution permitted with the recorded IGN attribution
source_reviews.cnig_mdt02_cob2: reviewed; derived redistribution permitted with the recorded IGN attribution
source_reviews.emodnet_dtm_2024_lat: reviewed; compact derivatives permitted under CC BY 4.0 with the recorded EMODnet acknowledgement

notes: The AOI GeoPackage is generated from the project-authored documented pilot bounds; it is not a redistributed source coastline.
EMODnet DTM 2024 may incorporate restricted originator surveys, but EMODnet publishes the composite DTM product itself under CC BY 4.0; no originator survey data is included here.
The predominantly background_only bathymetry classification must not be interpreted as local underwater geometry.
